caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 13 kt and wave heights of 2.9 ft, while Grenada has a similar wind speed of 13 kt. I expect these conditions to persist throughout the day, affecting port operations in both Martinique and Grenada, with less than 10% rain probability not being a factor in this region today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Weather Update
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing a 62% rain probability with winds at 12 kt and wave heights reaching 3.4 ft, while Mykonos is seeing winds of 21 kt. I expect the Western Mediterranean to have relatively calm conditions near Lisbon, but the Eastern Mediterranean near Mykonos will have stronger winds, although still below any advisory thresholds.
